active_context.conversation_arc: Planning session for Project Alpha API health check expansion. Reviewed the four artifacts drafted in the morning session, promoted three to 'ready', deferred one pending a schema question. Next execution session should be able to run the ready batch without further planning.
decisions_made: Verbose health endpoint returns per-subsystem status objects rather than a flat boolean; caller can drill into individual failures.
Health endpoint remains unauthenticated (consistent with /health), but /health/verbose will be gated behind the same allowlist the metrics endpoint uses on the Home Server deployment.
Draft artifact for the DB-backed session cache is being held — needs the schema question resolved with the operator before promoting to ready.
prompts_generated: cc-prompt: Add /health/verbose to Project Alpha API (ready, execution_order 1)
cc-prompt: Extend Project Alpha CLAUDE.md with the verbose-health contract (ready, execution_order 2)
cc-prompt: Add integration tests covering the new health shape (ready, execution_order 3)
cc-prompt: DB-backed session cache for Project Alpha (draft — awaiting schema decision)
next_steps: Confirm schema shape for session cache with operator before next session.
Let the interceptor pick up the three ready artifacts; check back after the digest note lands.

tone_notes: Session was productive — operator prefers terse confirmations over restated plans. When resuming, don't recap the conversation arc; just report state of the ready batch.
